_comment: Legion-specific overrides. The baseline (formations, upgrades, units, transports) is inherited from factions.json. Each legion below overrides identity, lore, legionTrait, allies and (optionally) compositionRules. Stats for unique characters / line variants can be added under 'unitOverrides' or 'extraUnits' which the backend merges at runtime.

legions.name: Dark Angels
legions.subtitle: I Legion · The First
legions.lore: The First Legion, raised on the death-world of Caliban under the watchful eye of the Lion. Secretive, knightly and ancient, the Dark Angels keep the Emperor's faith with cold steel, hidden orders and grim resolve. Where lesser Legions break ranks, the Sons of Caliban form their unbroken line.

legionTrait.name: Paragons of Battle
legionTrait.description: Dark Angels may take 1 free Champion upgrade per 750 points and may upgrade any unit which has access to the Consul upgrade. In addition, units with a Champion, Lieutenant Commander, or Supreme Commander upgrade may add +1 to their Close Combat value (up to a maximum of 2+).

weapons.name: Plasma Burners
weapons.firepower: 2x AP4+/AT5+, Fleshbane, Lance / (assault) Fleshbane, Lance, EA (+1)

weapons.name: Lion Sword
weapons.firepower: (assault) First strike, MW, EA (+1) / (assault) MW, EA (+1)

compositionRulesAppend: Interremptors and Deathwing Companions: 1 per 2,000 pts each.
Primarch Lion El'Jonson may only be taken once and counts as your Supreme Commander.

legions.name: Emperor's Children
legions.subtitle: III Legion · The Phoenician's Own
legions.lore: Fulgrim's chosen, the III Legion are the Emperor's masterwork of perfection. Their every blow is a study in lethal grace, their parade-ground precision matched only by their pitiless cruelty in the wake of the Phoenician's fall.

legionTrait.name: Exemplars of War
legionTrait.description: Once per game, a player may elect to add 1 to their Strategy Rating when rolling for Initiative. For that turn, they may also re-roll any one additional failed Action test (you may not re-roll a re-roll). In addition, for that turn, any Character unit may add +1 to their Close Combat value (up to a maximum of 2+).

extraFormations.name: Palatine Blades Band
extraFormations.composition: 4-6 Palatine Blade units (+65 per extra unit)

compositionRulesAppend: Kakophoni Band, Palatine Blades Band, Phoenix Terminator Detachment and Sunkiller Squad: 1 per 2,000 pts each.
Primarch Fulgrim may only be taken once and counts as your Supreme Commander.

legions.name: Iron Warriors
legions.subtitle: IV Legion · The Olympians
legions.lore: Perturabo's grim engineers excel at the brutal arithmetic of siegecraft. Where they march, walls fall and warriors are broken upon the anvil of their guns. They take no joy in war — only the cold satisfaction of a problem solved.

legionTrait.name: Brick by Brick
legionTrait.description: While taking a Shooting action, Iron Warriors impart a -1 modifier to enemy cover saves. Furthermore, Iron Warrior Infantry Character units gain the Siege trait.

extraFormations.name: Land Raider Squadron
extraFormations.composition: 4-6 Land Raider Phobos OR Proteus (Phobos +75 / Proteus +65 per extra)

extraFormations.name: Tyrant Siege Terminator Detachment
extraFormations.composition: 4-6 Siege Tyrant Terminator units (+85 per extra unit)

extraFormations.name: Artillery Battery
extraFormations.composition: 6 Basilisk (500) OR Medusa (325) OR Whirlwind (400) OR Arquitor (400)

extraFormations.name: Perturabo
extraFormations.composition: Perturabo and 3 terminator units OR 1 Tormentor OR 3 Iron Circle units

compositionRulesAppend: Artillery Battery: 1 per 1,000 pts.
Primarch Perturabo may only be taken once and counts as your Supreme Commander.

legions.name: White Scars
legions.subtitle: V Legion · The Storm Riders
legions.lore: Hailing from the steppes of Chogoris, the V Legion ride to war with the speed of the open sky. Jaghatai's sons strike like a hurricane and are gone before retribution can land, the thunder of their guns the only mark left in their wake.

legionTrait.name: Wind Born
legionTrait.description: Legion Light Vehicles and Armoured Vehicles ignore the -1 penalty to shooting attacks when taking a Double action. In addition, all Aircraft, Light Vehicles, Armoured Vehicles, and units with the Mounted trait may re-roll all failed dangerous terrain checks.

extraFormations.name: Chogorian Brotherhood
extraFormations.composition: 8 Outrider units (1-4 Outriders may be Scimitar Jetbikes)

extraFormations.name: Chogorian Skyhunters
extraFormations.composition: 6 Scimitar Jetbike (Consul, Any Jetbike may be upgraded)

extraFormations.name: Ebon Keshig
extraFormations.composition: 4 Ebon Keshig units, may add up to 2 Golden Keshig (+75 each)

extraFormations.name: Jaghatai Khan
extraFormations.composition: Jaghatai Khan (Foot or Mounted) + 3 Ebon Keshig units

compositionRulesAppend: Kyzgan Attack Speeder Squadron: 1 per 1,000 pts.
Ebon Keshig: 1 per 2,000 pts.
Primarch Jaghatai Khan may only be taken once and counts as your Supreme Commander.

legions.name: Space Wolves
legions.subtitle: VI Legion · The Rout
legions.lore: Leman Russ's wolf-pack from frozen Fenris. Half warriors, half wild, the VI are the Emperor's executioners — loosed when diplomacy ends and only slaughter remains.

legionTrait.name: Loping Advance
legionTrait.description: Space Wolf Character units gain the Brutal trait. In addition, Infantry units in this Legion gain +5cm to their countercharge and consolidation moves.

extraFormations.name: Leman Russ
extraFormations.composition: Leman Russ + 3 Varagyr Wolf Guard Terminator units

compositionRulesAppend: Deathsworn Warband, Wolf Guard Detachment, and Fenrisian Wolf Pack: 1 per 2,000 pts each.
Primarch Leman Russ may only be taken once and counts as your Supreme Commander.

legions.name: Imperial Fists
legions.subtitle: VII Legion · The Emperor's Praetorians
legions.lore: The VII Legion, sons of Rogal Dorn and chosen guardians of the Imperial Palace. Stoic, methodical and possessed of unmatched discipline, the Imperial Fists are the masters of siege warfare — equally peerless in breaching a fortress and in holding one against impossible odds. Where the line must hold, the Fists are there.

legionTrait.name: Disciplined Doctrine
legionTrait.description: Imperial Fist Tactical, Breacher, Phalanx Warder and Templar Brethren units may re-roll failed To Hit rolls of 1 when firing in the Firefight phase, and any formation containing at least one Phalanx Warder or Templar Brethren unit counts as having a Champion for the purposes of formation-level rules.

extraFormations.name: Rogal Dorn
extraFormations.composition: Rogal Dorn + 7 Tactical OR 3 Terminator units

castellum-stronghold.name: Castellum Stronghold
notes: Transport (may transport 8 infantry units of any type).

primus-redoubt.name: Primus Redoubt
notes: Transport (may transport 10 infantry units of any type).

compositionRulesAppend: Phalanx Warders, Templar Brethren and Castellum Stronghold: 1 per 2,000 pts each.
Primus Redoubt: 1 per 4,000 pts.
Primarch Rogal Dorn may only be taken once and counts as your Supreme Commander.

legions.name: Night Lords
legions.subtitle: VIII Legion · The Murder Sky
legions.lore: Konrad Curze's sons wage war by terror. Heralded by screaming vox-broadcasts and the corpses of the conquered, the VIII Legion are the Imperium's nightmare made flesh.

legionTrait.name: Terror Tactics
legionTrait.description: Enemy detachments engaged or fired upon by Night Lords units add +1 Blast Marker to their formation each turn this attack inflicts at least one casualty.

legions.name: Blood Angels
legions.subtitle: IX Legion · Angels of Baal
legions.lore: The IX Legion, sons of Sanguinius and bearers of the genetic legacy of their angelic Primarch. Beautiful, terrible and tireless in war, the Blood Angels fight with the grace of host of heaven and the fury of a sun rising over the battlefield. Where they descend, the enemy is undone in a single glorious charge.

legionTrait.name: The Red Thirst
legionTrait.description: Blood Angels Assault and Inductii units gain First strike in the first turn of any assault they initiate. In addition, Angel's Tears, Crimson Paladin and Dawnbreaker units automatically pass any Leadership test required to charge an enemy formation.

compositionRulesAppend: Angel's Tears Detachment and Crimson Paladin Detachment: 1 per 2,000 pts each. (Crimson Paladin cap is TBD in source.)
Dawnbreaker Cohort: 1 per 1,000 pts.
Primarch Sanguinius may only be taken once and counts as your Supreme Commander.

legions.name: Iron Hands
legions.subtitle: X Legion · The Gorgon's Sons
legions.lore: Ferrus Manus taught his Legion that flesh is weak. The X Legion replace what the Emperor gave them with cold iron, marching to war as half-machines that feel neither doubt nor pain.

legionTrait.name: Flesh is Weak
legionTrait.description: Iron Hands units may re-roll a single failed armour save per attack action. Dreadnought and Automata units within 15cm of an Iron Hands HQ re-roll failed repair rolls.

legions.name: World Eaters
legions.subtitle: XII Legion · The Eaters of Worlds
legions.lore: Angron's butchers, every warrior bears the Butcher's Nails. They live to kill, and find no honour but the honour of the close fight. Discipline ends where the enemy is in reach.

legionTrait.name: Blood Frenzy
legionTrait.description: World Eaters Infantry units must Charge if any enemy is within charge range when given an Engage order. They add +1 attack in the first round of any close combat.

legions.name: Ultramarines
legions.subtitle: XIII Legion · The Children of Guilliman
legions.lore: The XIII Legion is the very pattern of the Astartes. Guilliman's sons fight to the letter of the Codex, their drills perfect, their formations textbook, their discipline absolute.

legionTrait.name: Codex Astartes
legionTrait.description: Ultramarines detachments may re-roll their initiative roll once per turn. Combined attacks involving two or more Ultramarines detachments add +1 to the final to-hit roll.

legions.name: Death Guard
legions.subtitle: XIV Legion · The Reapers
legions.lore: Mortarion's sons march through poison-clouds where no other Legion can stand. Slow, unbreakable, terrifying — they are the corrosion that eats away at the foundations of all that resist them.

legionTrait.name: Indomitable
legionTrait.description: Death Guard Infantry units are not slowed by difficult or dangerous terrain and re-roll failed saves against Barrage attacks.

legions.name: Thousand Sons
legions.subtitle: XV Legion · The Wisdom-Bringers
legions.lore: Magnus's Legion of scholar-warriors. Every Astartes a sorcerer, every blade etched with arcane lore. They fight to preserve knowledge in a galaxy that would burn it.

legionTrait.name: Sorcerous Lore
legionTrait.description: Once per turn a Thousand Sons character may add +1 to the Firefight value of one friendly Infantry unit within 15cm until the end of the turn.

legions.name: Sons of Horus
legions.subtitle: XVI Legion · The Luperci
legions.lore: History records that it is the Sons of Horus Legion who lit the spark of rebellion and stood upon the ashes of the old Imperium. They above all others stand as a byword for treason to their foes, and as exemplars of resistance to adherents. They are the force of ambition, ruthlessness, and unbowed determination.

legionTrait.name: Death Dealers
legionTrait.description: When taking an Engage action, Infantry units add +1 to their Firefight value (up to a maximum of 2+).

compositionRulesAppend: Primarch Horus may only be taken once and counts as your Supreme Commander.
Reaver, Luperci and Justaerian Detachments: 1 per 2,000 pts each.

legions.name: Word Bearers
legions.subtitle: XVII Legion · The Bearers of the Word
legions.lore: Lorgar's faithful, the only Legion to truly believe. Where they go, daemons follow; where they preach, worlds burn in the name of gods both old and new.

legionTrait.name: Zealots
legionTrait.description: Word Bearers Infantry units are immune to the morale penalty for being broken in the first turn they receive Blast Markers. Allied Daemons of the Ruinstorm count as Cohesive Allies and do not count against the army's Allies points cap.

legions.name: Salamanders
legions.subtitle: XVIII Legion · Sons of Vulkan
legions.lore: The XVIII Legion, forged on the volcanic homeworld of Nocturne and tempered by the trials of their Primarch Vulkan. Patient, deliberate and possessed of an unyielding compassion for the innocent, the Salamanders march to war beneath drakescale cloaks, carrying flame and hammer to those who would prey upon the weak.

legionTrait.name: Promethean Cult
legionTrait.description: Salamanders units never lose a point of Firefight or Close Combat from suppression. In addition, any Salamander formation containing at least one Firedrake Terminator or Pyroclast unit may re-roll a single failed save per turn.

weapons.name: Flame Projector
weapons.firepower: AP4+, Ignore cover / (assault) Ignore cover, Armourbane

compositionRulesAppend: Firedrake Terminator Detachment counts as a Line slot for force composition.
Pyroclast Detachment: 1 per 2,000 pts.
Primarch Vulkan may only be taken once and counts as your Supreme Commander.

legions.name: Raven Guard
legions.subtitle: XIX Legion · The Shadowed Lords
legions.lore: The XIX Legion, led by the enigmatic Primarch Corvus Corax. Masters of guerrilla warfare, infiltration and the swift killing strike, the Raven Guard slip through enemy lines on ash-black wings and depart before the foe even knows they were struck. Where lesser Legions fight battles, the Sons of Deliverance fight wars from the shadows.

legionTrait.name: Strike From the Shadows
legionTrait.description: All Raven Guard infantry formations may add +5cm to their speed on the first turn of the game. In addition, any Raven Guard formation made up entirely of units with the Scout or Infiltrate ability may be deployed using the Infiltrate special rule regardless of its formation type.

darkwing-gunship.name: Darkwing Pattern Gunship
notes: Transport (may carry 3 of the following: Assault, Breacher, Tactical OR 1 Terminator).

compositionRulesAppend: Dark Furies Detachment: 1 per 2,000 pts.
Mor Deythan Squad and Darkwing Gunship Flight caps are TBD in source.
Raven Guard Scout Detachment counts as a Line slot rather than Support.
Primarch Corvus Corax may only be taken once and counts as your Supreme Commander.

legions.name: Alpha Legion
legions.subtitle: XX Legion · The Hydra
legions.lore: Alpharius and Omegon's Legion of masks. They are the dagger that strikes from no direction at all — operatives, infiltrators, master strategists who fight the war before the battle begins.

legionTrait.name: Hydra's Many Heads
legionTrait.description: At the start of the first turn, one Alpha Legion detachment of the player's choice may immediately make a free Advance move before either side activates a formation. Enemy units that fire on Alpha Legion detachments suffer -1 to-hit on the first turn of the game.
